title: Immersive Snowgen
body:
**About**

A mod aiming to spice up snow generation a bit.

 

World Generation Features:

    Varied snow layers instead of always being 0 (see images tab)
    Slippery snow - snow on which you slide. Rate of spawning configurable. (Note: by default, has the same texture as normal snow, but is replaceable by a resourcepack)
    Quicksnow - snow in which you sink. Rate of spawning configurable. (also has same texture as snow by default, is also replaceable by a resourcepack)
    The custom blocks (slippery snow and quicksnow) can be disabled to leave only the varied snow layers and effectively make the mod server-side only.

 

**F.A.Q**

 

Q: When port to version x.x.x?

A: If you want to do it, go ahead.

 

Q: Modpacks?

A: Of course! No need to ask.

 

Q: There is a crash! / This mod doesn't work with X! / I found a bug!

A: You can always report it on the issue tracker and I'll try and take a look.
